# G2P comparison baseline (frozen)

**Do not edit this file.** It records the pre-experiment 1:1 vs n:m comparison from 2026-05-21.

Current interactive comparisons and lexicon-normalization experiments are documented under
`docs/experiments/`. Regenerated six-locale tables still live in `docs/G2P_COMPARE.md`.

---

# G2P comparison: 1:1 vs n:m (MultigramG2P)

Generated: 2026-05-21 15:44 UTC

## Setup

- Seed: 42
- Test cap: 2000 entries (10% split, shuffled)
- 1:1: pretrained ``*-ipa.g2p.gz`` (decision tree only at eval time)
- n:m: MultigramG2P v3 joint decode + LM, EM iterations=15
- Parallel align: True
- Exceptions / lexicon lookup: off (pure G2P)

Embedded full-lexicon exceptions in the 1:1 ``.g2p.gz`` files are **not** used.
Multigram trains on the train split only; test words are never in its exception table.

WERr = any cooked pronunciation variant in the lexicon counts as correct.

## Summary

| Locale | 1:1 WER% | 1:1 PER% | n:m WER% | n:m PER% | Δ PER (1:1−n:m) | Winner |
|--------|----------|----------|----------|----------|-----------------|--------|
| es_MX | 4.60 | 0.63 | 5.45 | 0.75 | -0.12 | 1:1 |
| fr_FR | 59.25 | 9.32 | 50.80 | 7.37 | +1.95 | n:m |
| de_DE | 23.50 | 3.04 | 10.15 | 1.34 | +1.70 | n:m |
| en_US | 57.60 | 15.80 | 51.10 | 15.51 | +0.29 | n:m |
| pt_BR | 14.30 | 2.45 | 22.55 | 4.29 | -1.83 | 1:1 |
| it_IT | 32.25 | 5.16 | 31.55 | 4.92 | +0.24 | n:m |

n:m uses ``max_letter_span=3`` for fr_FR and de_DE (via locale config); others use the default of 2.

## es_MX

- Lexicon: `es_ipa.tsv` (45584 entries, 2000 test)
- Multi-pron words: 4
- 1:1 model: `/Volumes/hacks/dev/duolingo/scratch-speech-lab/projects/phonetic-decoding/build/g2p/es-mx/es-mx-ipa.g2p.gz`

| Model | train_s | WER% | WERr% | PER% | pos% |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| G2PDecisionTree | 0.1 | 4.60 | 4.60 | 0.63 | 98.97 |
| MultigramG2P | 29.6 | 5.45 | 5.45 | 0.75 | 98.88 |
